title: BSides Tampa 2026
description: "Unlucky 13" — tempt fate at the 13th annual BSides Tampa. Friday features low-cost training courses and early check-in; Saturday is the main event with talks, workshops, CTF competitions, a scholarship program, and networking with Tampa Bay's security community.
